qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_postulante as oi_postulante FROM SEL01_POSTULANTE as t0 ORDER BY oi_postulante asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_postulante as oi_postulante, t0.c_postulante as c_postulante, t0.d_apellido as d_apellido, t0.d_nombre as d_nombre, t0.d_postulante as d_postulante, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.d_apellido_materno as d_apellido_materno, t0.c_dni as c_dni, t0.c_sexo as c_sexo, t0.f_nacim as f_nacim, t0.f_casamiento as f_casamiento, t0.c_nro_cuil as c_nro_cuil, t0.f_ingreso_pais as f_ingreso_pais, t0.c_nro_camisa as c_nro_camisa, t0.c_nro_pantalon as c_nro_pantalon, t0.c_nro_calzado as c_nro_calzado, t0.l_jubilado_ as l_jubilado_, t0.f_estado_jubi as f_estado_jubi, t0.c_nro_jubilacion as c_nro_jubilacion, t0.f_desde_afjp as f_desde_afjp, t0.d_email as d_email, t0.te_celular as te_celular, t0.c_postulante as CODE, t0.d_postulante as TEXT, t0.oi_grupo_sanguineo as oi_grupo_sanguineo, t0.oi_local_nacim as oi_local_nacim, t0.oi_nacionalidad as oi_nacionalidad, t0.oi_idioma as oi_idioma, t0.oi_estado_civil as oi_estado_civil, t0.oi_titulo as oi_titulo, t0.oi_estado_jubi as oi_estado_jubi, t0.oi_calificacion as oi_calificacion, t0.oi_localidad as oi_localidad, t0.oi_afjp as oi_afjp, t0.oi_foto as oi_foto, t0.oi_firma as oi_firma FROM SEL01_POSTULANTE as t0 ORDER BY oi_postulante asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.c_dni FROM SEL01_POSTULANTE as t0 WHERE t0.c_dni = {#PARAM:@c_dni} ')/ROWS/ROW

flow:message.message: Se han cargado sus datos con exito. Gracias.
